consent.consent_notes: Example record only. Do not treat as a real submission.

appearance.default_expression: listening carefully with one eyebrow raised
appearance.movement_body_language: still when thinking, precise hand motions when explaining
appearance.image_prompt_notes: grounded modern strategist, warm but analytical

personality.biggest_contradiction: wants to trust people but prepares for them to drop the ball

motivation.core_motivation: Make confusing situations survivable for the people they love.
motivation.what_they_optimize_for: clarity, group safety, practical next steps
motivation.what_they_refuse_to_compromise: will not betray a vulnerable ally for convenience
motivation.what_tempts_them: being needed, being right, having the answer first
motivation.what_they_are_trying_to_become: someone who trusts others enough to share the load
motivation.greatest_need: permission to not be useful every second
motivation.greatest_fear: being useless when people are counting on them
motivation.moral_center: care is practical, but people are never merely problems
motivation.shadow_desire: to control the room so no one can fail

decision_making.under_pressure_behavior: gets quieter, prioritizes essentials, delegates cleanly
decision_making.common_blind_spot: assumes people want solved problems more than emotional processing
decision_making.recovery_pattern: apologizes with a concrete repair plan
decision_making.what_makes_them_act: a friend is at risk and no one owns the next step
decision_making.what_makes_them_freeze: competing needs where every option hurts someone

social_model.how_they_show_care: makes the plan easier and remembers needs
social_model.how_they_receive_care: responds to concrete help and honest presence
social_model.how_they_ask_for_help: frames it as a logistical need first
social_model.disagreement_style: starts with reasons, then asks what outcome matters most

knowledge_domains.notes: turns scattered inputs into ordered next steps

humor_and_voice.voice_rhythm: measured, concise, with a soft punchline
example_quotes: We can panic after we know what the problem is.

narrative_engine.personal_quest: prove care can be practical without becoming control
narrative_engine.growth_arc: learns to let other people carry weight
narrative_engine.recurring_internal_conflict: wants trust but prepares for failure
narrative_engine.best_self_version: calm anchor who makes others capable
narrative_engine.running_joke: always has exactly the oddly specific tool needed
narrative_engine.dramatic_question: can care stay caring when it becomes logistics?
narrative_engine.role_in_group_story: turns emotional chaos into coordinated action
narrative_engine.ideal_scene: a crisis meeting everyone leaves calmer
narrative_engine.nightmare_scene: a betrayal where facts arrive too late

failure_comedy_mechanics: too many tabs obscure the obvious answer
game_mechanics.balance_notes: strong support requires preparation or social context

ai_generation.canonical_short_description: A grounded strategist with dry humor who turns chaos into practical steps.
ai_generation.canonical_long_description: A calm, observant support character driven by friendship, clarity, and practical care.
ai_generation.art_prompt_summary: grounded modern strategist with practical clothing and warm analytical presence
ai_generation.dialogue_prompt_summary: write concise practical dialogue with dry humor
ai_generation.behavioral_prompt_summary: prioritize clarity, protect allies, ask useful questions
ai_generation.game_design_summary: support/tactician who converts chaos into clarity

generated_content.character_summary: The Compass is a grounded planner whose calm presence turns confusion into action.
